reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of priors and search bias, but does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links hard-to-vary scoring, human priors, and misleading combinatorial search pictures through linguistic edge cases.
falsifiable_why: Could fail if representation-independent scoring works, or if human priors demonstrably do not shape filtering outcomes.
explanation: Search guidance inherits hidden priors unless representation and scoring assumptions are made explicit.
